headline: Marc Cucurella — update
body: 💙👋🏼 Marc Cucurella: “It’s not easy to leave Chelsea. I am very grateful for everything Chelsea has given me… …but the step I take now is bigger: I return to my country and to a great club”. https://t.co/HBGOGSw9k1
text:
💙👋🏼 Marc Cucurella: “It’s not easy to leave Chelsea. I am very grateful for everything Chelsea has given me…

…but the step I take now is bigger: I return to my country and to a great club”. https://t.co/HBGOGSw9k1
